positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration featuring a collection of playful woodland animals (foxes, raccoons, owls, deer) engaged in a whimsical forest scene. The characters should have smooth, clean silhouettes, bold outlines, and expressive, friendly poses. The background should be abstract and patterned with botanical elements—mushrooms, ferns, dappled light effects, and geometric forest motifs—rendered in a limited, earthy color palette of sage green, burnt orange, deep teal, and creamy yellow. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, designed to wrap neatly around fabric. Flat graphic style with high contrast, evoking sophisticated modern folk art. Clean vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, watermark, signature, text, blurred, noisy, artifact, ugly, poor anatomy, malformed, out of frame, cropped, bad edges, dirty, grunge, photorealistic
